rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level signal routing should be defined in the implementation annex after subcomponents and connections are declared
generic_rules: Component names, ports, and data types must be sourced from the authoritative AADL model structure
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes
Implementation-level bindings must be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Subcomponent ports should not be used in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
